mechanism_narrative: Elevated federal funds rates increase corporate borrowing costs and discount future equity cash flows, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive 20-day returns exceed 55% when FEDFUNDS is above 4.0%.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid three-month increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending economic contraction, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in > 60% of triggered instances, or the signal fails to predict direction during late-cycle expansions.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent expansion in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based demand strength, supporting corporate earnings growth and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in GDPC1 and RSAFS yields negative 60-day returns in > 50% of cases, or interaction term Rank IC < 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects improving manufacturing capacity utilization and supply-side momentum, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO acceleration fails to predict positive 5-day returns during post-shock recovery phases, with accuracy below 52%.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained consumer price index levels above 315.0 trigger expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL > 315.0 coincides with positive 5-day returns in > 55% of observations, or Rank IC remains negative over 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirms robust labor market expansion, boosting consumer spending expectations and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative 20-day returns in > 50% of cases, or the interaction effect shows no statistical significance in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Increasing housing starts signal strong residential investment demand and construction sector activity, forecasting positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: HOUST growth consistently precedes negative 60-day returns, or the series shows zero predictive power across all tested windows.

mechanism_narrative: Two consecutive monthly declines in industrial production indicate a supply-side contraction that threatens corporate output and earnings, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Consecutive INDPRO declines are followed by positive 20-day returns in > 55% of cases during late-cycle expansions.
